strategy: Domain events for API Gateway, n8n, HD-BRAIN and audit pipelines

events.name: web.lead.created
events.description: Public lead created from the corporate website.

events.name: rh.candidate.created
events.description: New candidate registered in the recruitment platform.

events.name: crm.client.assigned
events.description: Client assigned to a human agent or team.

events.name: crm.account_status.overdue_detected
events.description: Client account requires follow-up due to overdue status.

events.name: crm.conversation.started
events.description: Conversation started with approved policy and template.

events.name: crm.conversation.escalated_to_human
events.description: Conversation transferred to a human agent.

events.name: crm.payment_commitment.missed
events.description: Client payment commitment missed and requires review.

events.name: brain.risk.detected
events.description: Global operational or financial risk detected by control tower.

events.name: brain.automation.requested
events.description: HD-BRAIN requests an approved automation execution.

events.name: audit.action.recorded
events.description: Sensitive action recorded in audit trail.
